name: Delicious Corn Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, beat egg yolks until thick and lemon colored (5-8 minutes).
2. Add melted butter, sugars, salt, vanilla, cinnamon, and nutmeg; mix well.
3. Add corn, then stir in cream and milk. Mix until combined.
4. Beat egg whites until stiff; fold into the yolk mixture.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 1-1/2 quart baking dish.
6. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F for 35 minutes or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
7. Cover loosely during the last 10 minutes of baking if necessary to prevent overbrowning.
